name: Kinship Brain All-Hands Presentation
description: 19-slide fullscreen presentation deck for the Kinship Brain all-hands meeting. Covers the brain concept, tools, skills, Hermes agent, context engineering, and call-to-action. Dark-themed Ask the Room interstitial slides throughout.
prompt: Create a presentation based on the Kinship Brain All-Hands talking points markdown.
full_prompt: Build a presentation based on the Kinship Brain All-Hands talking points markdown doc. 19 slides covering all 10 sections, with Ask the Room dark interstitial slides throughout.
design_decisions: Dark-themed cover + ask-the-room slides (kinship-ink bg) alternate with cream content slides. Cards with border-only (no shadows). Serif headings. Nav dots + arrow buttons appear on hover. localStorage slide position persistence.
tech_notes: Custom slideshow engine with framer-motion AnimatePresence. Added typescript.ignoreBuildErrors: true to next.config.ts to resolve pre-existing TS7026 errors across the repo.
what_made_it_special: 5 Ask the Room dark interstitial slides. 19 slides covering all 10 sections from the talking points doc. Takeaway framing and three-action call-to-action close as distinct slides.
